Brand_A.description: Driving distances (in yards) for Brand A golf balls, each measured by one of 10 golfers. Same golfers also hit Brand B, C, and D balls (blocking structure).

Brand_B.description: Driving distances (in yards) for Brand B golf balls, each measured by one of 10 golfers. Same golfers also hit Brand A, C, and D balls (blocking structure).

Brand_C.description: Driving distances (in yards) for Brand C golf balls, each measured by one of 10 golfers. Same golfers also hit Brand A, B, and D balls (blocking structure).

Brand_D.description: Driving distances (in yards) for Brand D golf balls, each measured by one of 10 golfers. Same golfers also hit Brand A, B, and C balls (blocking structure).

Golfer.description: Golfer identifier serving as the blocking factor (b=10 blocks) in the randomized block design. Each golfer hits one ball of each brand. Used in computing denominator df = n − k − b + 1 = 27.
